1509100002.english: It's where Epsilon's body is trapped.

1509100004.english: Is that person over there Epsilon?

1509100005.korean: 이번에는 반드시 내 몸을 되찾을 거야…
1509100005.english: This time, I'll definitely get my body back…

1509100007.korean: 정면으로 돌파하여 적의 주력 부대를 끌어들이게 하고, 다른 곳으로 정예 부대를 침투시키는 양동 작전인가요.
1509100007.english: So it's a pincer operation: break through the front to draw the enemy's main forces, while inserting elite troops elsewhere.

1509100010.english: I'm not pleased to see you.

1509100012.english: Aren't you being a bit too stiff?

1509100014.korean: 젠장, 딱 잘라 말하잖아... 할 말이 없네… 말로는 도무지 못 이기겠다.
1509100014.english: Damn, you speak so bluntly… I have nothing to say… I can't win with words.

1509100015.english: I assume you'll refuse, but I'll say it anyway.

1509100016.english: I ask you to lower your weapon and surrender peacefully.

1509100017.korean: 항복하면 어떻게 되는데? 그때처럼 침입자를 붙잡으라는 명령이야?
1509100017.english: What happens if we surrender? Is it the same order to capture the intruder like before?

1509100018.korean: 아니요. 이번에는 침입자를 제거하라는 명령을 받았습니다.
1509100018.english: No. This time we've been ordered to eliminate the intruder.

1509100019.english: So surrendering will mean immediate execution.

1509100021.korean: 고통스럽지 않게 끝내 드릴 수 있습니다.
1509100021.english: I can end it without pain.

1509100023.korean: 하지만 이번에는 그때랑 좀 상황이 다르거든.
1509100023.english: But this time the situation's a bit different from before.

1509100024.korean: 오히려 너에게 항복을 권해야 한다고 생각되는데?
1509100024.english: Actually, I think I should be the one urging you to surrender.

1509100025.korean:
새로운 침입자 인물을 식별
비전투원 바이오로이드 1명, 전투원 바이오로이드 4명.
1509100025.english: Identified new intruder: 1 non‑combat bio‑android, 4 combat bio‑androids.

1509100026.korean: 레모네이드 오메가의 부관 유미, 엠프레시스 하운드 멤버로 확인.
1509100026.english: Deputy Yumi of Lemonade Omega confirmed as an Empress Hound member.

1509100028.english: Result… at a disadvantage with a 42.7% win rate.

1509100029.korean: 이 멤버를 상대로 그 정도 승률이 나오는 거냐…
1509100029.english: So that's the win rate against these members…

1509100031.korean:
저의 임무는 이곳을 지키는 것입니다.
항복 권고는 거절하겠습니다.
1509100031.english: My mission is to protect this place. I refuse any suggestion to surrender.

1509100032.english: There's no point in regretting it later!
